rationale: Documentation improvement for element::bool(); no spec behavior involved.
Deleting deprecated API overloads; internal API cleanup, no spec rule violated.
C++17 string_view compatibility bug in build; no spec behavior involved.
Build failure with C++17 polyfill; compile error, no spec behavior involved.
Adding spec test that reads ignore db/collection readConcern in transaction; test update per DRIVERS-576.
Installing license and third-party notices to correct directory; build/packaging, no spec involved.
Removing GitPython build dependency; build tooling change, no spec behavior involved.
Test failure on zSeries due to outdated server version; CI infrastructure issue, not spec nonconformance.
Improvement to not send $readPreference to standalone servers per DRIVERS-664; proactive spec rollout, driver not previously wrong.
Exporting CMake targets for downstream projects; build system improvement, no spec behavior.
Deprecation warning from using mongoc_uri_get_ssl; build warning fix, no spec behavior.
Updating CRUD spec tests to use runOn syntax per DRIVERS-679; test format update, not driver behavior fix.
ChangeStream Resumable Error definition in spec is too broad; root cause is spec, depends on DRIVERS-650 for spec fix.
Typos in install guide; documentation fix, no spec behavior involved.
CMake build failure finding C driver packages; build system bug, no spec behavior.
Making pipeline class extensible for newer aggregation stages; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule violated.
Catch test framework SECTION execution guarantee bug; internal test infrastructure, no spec behavior.
scoped_bson_t::steal() internal flag not cleared; implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Installation docs built from wrong branch; documentation issue, no spec behavior.
Adding MongoDB 4.2 to CI test matrix per DRIVERS-665; CI infrastructure improvement, no spec behavior.
Ambiguous overload compile error with clang/libc++; build issue, no spec behavior involved.
SDAM spec requires running flow even when server description equals last; Bug type per DRIVERS-830 spec requirement.
Deprecating geoHaystack/geoSearch per server deprecation; API maintenance following DRIVERS-987, no spec nonconformance.
Adding new URI option for certificate revocation checking per DRIVERS-975; new feature addition, not existing nonconformance.
Missing key() function on array::element; API ergonomics gap, no spec rule violated.
Implementing SDAM spec changes for topologyVersion and stale error handling per DRIVERS-1187; Improvement type, spec rollout.
SDAM/server-selection specs silent on wrong setName in single topology; fix required spec amendment via DRIVERS-980.
Adding speculative authentication support per DRIVERS-918; new feature/spec addition, not existing nonconformance.
CVE-2021-32050: drivers publish auth-related data to command listeners; command monitoring spec violated by exposing sensitive data.
Adding RetryableWriteError labels to retryable transaction tests per DRIVERS-826; test file update, not driver behavior fix.
Reducing default keepalive time to align with Azure defaults per DRIVERS-1228; connection tuning, no spec rule violated.
Change stream spec test failing on CXX master; investigating and fixing spec test, test infrastructure issue.
Implementing b_type to bson_value_t conversions; internal BSON API improvement, no spec rule violated.
Making TCP keepalive default to true per DRIVERS-383; connection default change, no specific spec rule.
Avoiding readConcern snapshot in sharded transaction tests per DRIVERS-735; test file update, not driver behavior fix.
Removing ElectionInProgress from ResumableChangeStreamError per DRIVERS-973 spec update; Improvement/spec rollout not existing nonconformance.
Adding missing URI option getters to sync with libmongoc and URI options spec; API completeness, not spec nonconformance.
Spec clarification on RetryableWriteError label in transactions per DRIVERS-1181; Improvement type, spec rollout not bug fix.
WriteConcernError errInfo object must be propagated per spec; driver was not propagating it, per DRIVERS-967.
Documenting allowDiskUse as 4.4+ only per DRIVERS-1193; documentation fix, no driver behavior change.
Cannot build with Visual Studio 2019; build/compile issue, no spec behavior involved.
Bumping minimum required C driver version; dependency management, no spec behavior.
Spec requires not repeatedly resuming on same getMore error; driver was resuming infinitely per DRIVERS-907.
Updating Catch test framework to Catch2; test tooling upgrade, no spec behavior involved.
Unifying replica set discovery configuration behavior per DRIVERS-737; Improvement type, proactive spec rollout.
Fixing FLE tests to not use admin database per DRIVERS-1194; test setup fix, not driver behavior change.
Adding make_value helper for creating owning bson values; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule.
Changing encrypt::key_id() to take owning bson_value; API ergonomics/lifetime improvement, no spec rule.
Spec requires CursorNotFound to be treated as resumable change stream error; driver was not handling it per DRIVERS-1308.
Implementing OCSP support per DRIVERS-704; new feature addition, not existing spec nonconformance.
